SHAFT_Engine, 10.2.20260614

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    BidiBrowserEventCollector
    WebDriver BiDi collector using preload scripts for immediate cross-context signals.
    BrowserEventCollector
    Collects browser signals without persisting unclassified values.
    BrowserEventScript
    Loads the browser-side semantic event listener.
    BrowserMetadata
    Browser and logical session metadata retained by a capture.
    BrowserSignal
    Raw browser signal containing an immediate DOM snapshot but no persisted value.
    CaptureBrowser
    Browser families supported by managed SHAFT Capture recording.
    CaptureCli
    Executable local CLI for managed SHAFT Capture recording.
    CaptureControlClient
    Authenticated client for a detached local capture recorder.
    CaptureControlFiles
    Atomic local state files used by the detached capture process.
    CaptureControlFiles.ControlDescriptor
    Safe loopback endpoint metadata.
    CaptureControlServer
    Loopback-only authenticated control endpoint for a detached recorder.
    CaptureEnrichmentPreview
    Reviewable, fingerprinted AI proposal that is never applied implicitly.
    CaptureEnrichmentPreview.AssertionSuggestion
    Additional assertion bound to captured element state.
    CaptureEnrichmentPreview.Proposal
    Optional source naming and assertion suggestions.
    CaptureEnrichmentService
    Produces schema-validated AI naming and assertion previews from sanitized Capture metadata.
    CaptureEvent
    Versioned browser action or explicit verification captured for replay.
    CaptureEvent.AlertAction
    Alert operations.
    CaptureEvent.AlertEvent
    Browser alert event.
    CaptureEvent.ClearEvent
    Clear event.
    CaptureEvent.ClickEvent
    Click event.
    CaptureEvent.FrameAction
    Frame operations.
    CaptureEvent.FrameEvent
    Frame event.
    CaptureEvent.KeyboardEvent
    Keyboard event.
    CaptureEvent.MouseButton
    Mouse buttons.
    CaptureEvent.NavigationAction
    Navigation actions.
    CaptureEvent.NavigationEvent
    Navigation event.
    CaptureEvent.SelectEvent
    Select-list event.
    CaptureEvent.SelectMode
    Select-list operations.
    CaptureEvent.ToggleEvent
    Check or uncheck event.
    CaptureEvent.TypeEvent
    Typing event.
    CaptureEvent.UploadEvent
    Upload event containing only a logical file reference and safe metadata.
    CaptureEvent.VerificationEvent
    Explicit verification event.
    CaptureEvent.VerificationKind
    Explicit verification kinds.
    CaptureEvent.WaitCondition
    Wait conditions.
    CaptureEvent.WaitEvent
    Explicit wait event.
    CaptureEvent.WindowAction
    Window and tab operations.
    CaptureEvent.WindowEvent
    Window or tab event.
    CaptureFormatException
    Reports invalid, malformed, or unsupported capture artifacts without echoing their contents.
    CaptureGenerationReport
    Deterministic generation, locator-selection, compilation, and replay report.
    CaptureGenerationReport.Enrichment
    Optional AI enrichment state.
    CaptureGenerationReport.Enrichment.EnrichmentStatus
    Enrichment status.
    CaptureGenerationReport.LocatorDecision
    One explainable locator choice.
    CaptureGenerationReport.Status
    Generation status.
    CaptureGenerationReport.Validation
    Compile or replay result.
    CaptureGenerationReport.Validation.ValidationStatus
    Validation status.
    CaptureGenerationRequest
    Immutable options for converting a persisted Capture session into a SHAFT TestNG test.
    CaptureGenerationRequest.EnrichmentMode
    AI enrichment lifecycle.
    CaptureGenerationResult
    Generated artifact paths and their deterministic report.
    CaptureGenerator
    Deterministic pipeline that validates, renders, compiles, replays, and reports generated SHAFT tests.
    CaptureJsonCodec
    Stable human-readable JSON codec with schema validation and migration.
    CaptureManager
    Thread-safe local lifecycle API shared by CLI and MCP capture controls.
    CapturePrivacyClassifier
    Applies deterministic privacy classification before capture data reaches disk.
    CapturePrivacyClassifier.ClassifiedUpload
    Safe upload reference and metadata.
    CapturePrivacyClassifier.SanitizedAttributes
    Sanitized attributes and safe redaction summary.
    CapturePrivacyClassifier.SanitizedText
    Sanitized text and safe redaction summary.
    CapturePrivacyPolicy
    Deterministic capture privacy configuration.
    CaptureSchemaMigrator
    Deterministic migrations for supported older capture schemas.
    CaptureSession
    Immutable versioned SHAFT Capture session.
    CaptureSession.SessionStatus
    Session lifecycle states.
    CaptureSessionStore
    Thread-safe start, append, checkpoint, stop, and interruption lifecycle for one capture file.
    CaptureStartRequest
    Validated request for a managed browser capture session.
    CaptureStatus
    Safe recorder status returned by CLI and MCP controls.
    CaptureStatus.State
    Recorder lifecycle states.
    Checkpoint
    Human-review checkpoint in a capture session.
    Checkpoint.CheckpointKind
    Supported checkpoint kinds.
    ClassifiedValue
    Privacy-classified value ready for safe session and data-file handling.
    CompositeBrowserEventCollector
    Combines protocol and compatibility collectors behind one lifecycle.
    ElementSnapshot
    Sanitized element evidence at the time of an action.
    EventContext
    Fields shared by every captured event.
    EventContext.ReplayStatus
    Replay lifecycle status.
    EvidenceReference
    Safe reference to optional capture evidence.
    EvidenceReference.EvidenceType
    Supported evidence categories.
    ExternalTestDataReference
    Reference to external test data without retaining the original value.
    ExternalTestDataReference.DataClassification
    Deterministic privacy classifications.
    ExternalTestDataReference.DataSource
    External data sources supported by generated tests.
    ExternalTestDataWriter
    Writes ordinary captured values to deterministic external JSON while excluding secrets.
    GeneratedTestValidator
    Compiles generated Java and optionally replays it in an isolated TestNG process.
    LocatorCandidate
    Locator evidence retained for deterministic ranking and review.
    LocatorCandidate.LocatorSignal
    Deterministic evidence signals.
    LocatorCandidate.LocatorStrategy
    Supported locator evidence strategies.
    LocatorRanker
    Deterministically ranks captured locator evidence with explainable scoring.
    LocatorRanker.LocatorSelection
    Ranked selection and fallback candidates.
    LocatorRanker.ScoredLocator
    One scored candidate.
    PageContext
    Sanitized page state at the time of an event.
    PollingBrowserEventCollector
    Classic WebDriver fallback for browsers where BiDi collection is unavailable.
    RedactionSummary
    Safe aggregate of privacy decisions without removed values.
